# tfe_aws_oidc_configuration

Generates a new TFE AWS OIDC Configuration.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_arn` (String) The AWS ARN of your role.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization to which the TFE AWS OIDC configuration belongs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the AWS OIDC configuration.
